metadata.description: Search evaluation test suite for IMS hybrid search (pgvector + keyword + recency via hybrid_search RPC)
metadata.notes: All must_include_titles are verified against the live database as of 25/02/2026. Default threshold is 0.35. The hybrid_search RPC combines embedding similarity (70%) + title match (15%) + keyword match (10%) + summary/author (5%) + recency (5%).

test_cases.query: Claude Code best practices and workflows

must_include_titles: Claude Code Best Practices: Orchestration Workflows from Anthropic's Team
Claude Code Skills: Six-Part Series on Coding Standards Automation
expectations.notes: Core topic with strong keyword and semantic signal. Both ai-tools-frameworks (tool descriptions) and how-to-guides (tutorials) should appear. High confidence test -- many items match.

test_cases.query: AI replacing software engineers and developers

must_include_titles: Ryan Dahl (Node.js Creator) Declares Human-Written Code Is Over
Software Dev Director on Team Identity Crisis as AI Reshapes Engineering Craft
expectations.notes: Conceptual search -- should find workforce impact items even though they may not use the exact phrase 'replacing engineers'. Tests semantic understanding beyond keyword matching.

test_cases.query: Ethan Mollick AI research and insights

must_include_titles: Ethan Mollick: Management Skills as the Key Superpower in the Agentic AI Era
expectations.notes: Tests whether the embedding captures author name alongside topic. Ethan Mollick has 73 items in the database -- the search should surface his most topically relevant items, not just any item by him.

test_cases.query: AI governance and responsible scaling policy

must_include_titles: Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy v3.0 — Frontier AI Risk Governance
expectations.notes: Cross-domain test: governance touches ai-safety-governance (technical) but also organisational-strategy and ai-society-critique. Should strongly favour ai-safety-governance but may pull from others. The 'AI Governance vs Data Governance' item focuses on data governance which is semantically distant from responsible scaling.

test_cases.query: MCP server tools and protocol integration

must_include_titles: Charlotte: Open Source Browser MCP Server with 136x Token Efficiency
MCP Official Extension Repository: Docs, Samples, and Quickstarts for Developers
expectations.notes: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a specific technical protocol with dedicated items. Tests precision on a well-defined technical term.

test_cases.query: startup strategy and business models in the AI era

must_include_titles: How AI Startups Build Defensibility Against Platform Commoditisation
AI-Native vs Traditional SaaS: Business Models, Lean Teams, and New Pricing
expectations.notes: Broad theme spanning two domains. Should rank STRATEGY & BUSINESS items highly but also pull relevant INSIGHTS items. The 'AI era' framing tests whether semantic search connects strategy with AI context.

test_cases.query: quantum computing and superconductor breakthroughs

expectations.notes: Negative test (relaxed) -- the collection has some tangential quantum computing content (IBM, Brian Greene interviews). With hybrid search, keyword matches on 'computing' and 'breakthroughs' pull in more results than pure semantic. Top results should still have moderate similarity (< 0.45).

test_cases.query: prompt engineering techniques for LLMs

must_include_titles: Universal Prompt Framework Template for Claude and Other LLMs
Prompt Engineering Playbook for AI Coding Assistants
expectations.notes: Keyword-semantic overlap test. 'Prompt engineering' is both a keyword and a semantic concept. Items with 'prompt' in title AND semantically related items should both appear.

test_cases.query: Klarna AI workforce reduction and headcount cuts

must_include_titles: Klarna CEO on Cutting Headcount 50% Through AI Acceleration
Klarna CEO on Why SaaS Is Dead and AI-Driven Workforce Reduction
expectations.notes: Specific company + topic test. Both Klarna transcript items should appear near the top. Tests whether the search connects a specific company name with the broader topic.

test_cases.query: venture capital AI investment and fundraising

must_include_titles: Anthropic's $30B Raise and Wall Street's All-In Bet on AI
VC Perspective on SaaS Terminal Value Erosion from AI Disruption
expectations.notes: Should surface transcript items prominently -- the 20VC/SaaStr podcast transcripts are rich in VC and investment content. Tests whether long-form transcript embeddings match investment queries.

test_cases.query: future of SaaS software being disrupted by AI

must_include_titles: Klarna CEO on Why SaaS Is Dead and AI-Driven Workforce Reduction
Andreessen Horowitz GP on Why AI Won't Replace Enterprise SaaS
expectations.notes: Tests opposing viewpoints -- both 'SaaS is dead' and 'SaaS won't be replaced' items should appear, showing the search finds semantically related content regardless of stance.

test_cases.query: Addy Osmani on AI coding tools and developer workflows

must_include_titles: Chrome DevTools MCP Server for AI Coding Agent Integration
Responsible AI-Assisted Development: Avoiding the Vibe Coding Trap
expectations.notes: Addy Osmani has 9 items. Tests author-topic intersection -- should surface his specific posts about AI dev tools rather than generic AI tool posts by others.

test_cases.query: AI agents replacing human workers in enterprise

must_include_titles: Deloitte's Human-Agentic Workforce: Humans and AI Agents as Coworkers
AI Agent Adoption Dominated by Software Engineering — Verification Is Key
expectations.notes: Cross-subtopic test within INSIGHTS. Should bridge ai-agents-automation-trends (agent capabilities) with ai-workforce-impact (displacement). Tests whether semantic search connects the agent technology with its workforce implications.

test_cases.query: Anthropic Claude model safety and alignment research

must_include_titles: Anthropic's Safety Concerns with Claude Opus 4.6 Agentic Behaviour
Anthropic Research: Reward Hacking Generalises to Broader LLM Misalignment
expectations.notes: Tests specificity to Anthropic's safety research vs general AI safety. Should rank Anthropic-specific items higher than generic governance posts.

test_cases.query: learning resources and courses for AI skills

must_include_titles: Google AI Professional Certificate: Hands-On AI Skills in Under 10 Hours
Wharton's Human-Centred AI Course Framework as a Benchmark
expectations.notes: Should strongly favour LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT domain. Tests whether the search correctly routes educational/learning queries to the right domain rather than scattering across AI & EMERGING TECH.

test_cases.query: blockchain cryptocurrency DeFi web3 tokens

expectations.notes: Second negative test -- crypto/web3 content is absent from the collection. Should return very few or no results. Any results should have low similarity scores.

test_cases.query: AI product ideas and new startup launches

must_include_titles: VoiceOS: Universal Voice Interface for 10X Productivity
expectations.notes: Tests the boundary between PRODUCTS & INNOVATION (product-ideas subtopic, 40 items) and INSIGHTS market-signals-moves (224 items). Should return a mix of both -- actual product descriptions and market analysis of launches.

test_cases.query: OpenAI Codex and AI coding assistants

must_include_titles: OpenAI Codex Lead on the Future of Coding, Agents, and Software Engineering
Practical Tips for Getting the Most Out of OpenAI Codex App
expectations.notes: Specific product + category test. Should surface OpenAI Codex items alongside broader AI coding assistant content (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot discussions).

test_cases.query: constitutional AI and machine ethics philosophy

must_include_titles: Anthropic Publishes Claude's Constitutional AI Guidelines
Anthropic's Claude Constitution: A Philosophical AI Governance Milestone
expectations.notes: Philosophical/abstract concept test. 'Constitutional AI' is a specific Anthropic term but 'machine ethics' is broader. Tests whether embeddings capture the philosophical dimension of AI safety.

test_cases.query: cybersecurity threats from AI and autonomous attacks

must_include_titles: First Evidence of AI-Driven Autonomous Cyberattacks at Scale
Anthropic Disrupts First AI-Orchestrated Cyber Espionage Campaign
expectations.notes: Niche topic that sits at the intersection of AI safety and cybersecurity. Should find the specific cyber-related items within the ai-safety-governance subtopic rather than returning generic safety content.
